Here is a paragraph about Bixa orellana:

Bixa orellana, also known as Bihai or Annatto, is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest. It has been traditionally used for its health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Bixa orellana include carotenoids, particularly bixin, which is responsible for its yellow-orange color, as well as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The most common herbal preparations made with Bixa orellana include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues, from skin conditions to gastrointestinal problems.
